### #004 [RAW] SUPERVISOR_KICKOFF_RAW_OUTPUT

<details>
<summary>Open raw LLM output</summary>

```text
{
  "supervisor_decision": {
    "action": "start_run",
    "global_objective": {
      "objective_layers": [
        "missed_priority",
        "energy_total"
      ],
      "explanation": {
        "layer_priority": "First minimize missed priority to maximize valuable task coverage, then minimize total energy to reduce resource use.",
        "rationale": "User goal emphasizes coverage first, then efficiency. Missed priority directly captures coverage of high-value tasks; energy_total reflects resource consumption given dominant risk."
      }
    },
    "next_contract": {
      "contract_type": "initial_construction",
      "objective_layers": [
        "missed_priority",
        "energy_total"
      ],
      "feasibility_control": {
        "mode": "strict",
        "relaxation_ratios": []
      },
      "target_policy": {
        "preferred_target_kinds": [
          "unassigned_priority"
        ]
      },
      "protected_metrics": [],
      "resource_policy": {
        "min_actions": 1,
        "max_actions": 10,
        "max_iters": 2000,
        "max_time_sec": 300.0
      },
      "exit_conditions": {
        "success": [
          {
            "condition_id": "feasible_solution_found",
            "source": "best_feasible.exists",
            "op": "==",
            "value": true,
            "window": 1
          }
        ],
        "failure": [
          {
            "condition_id": "max_actions_reached",
            "source": "progress.solver_actions",
            "op": ">=",
            "value": 10,
            "window": 1
          },
          {
            "condition_id": "max_iters_reached",
            "source": "progress.iters_used",
            "op": ">=",
            "value": 2000,
            "window": 1
          }
        ]
      },
      "explanation": {
        "contract_purpose": "Construct an initial feasible solution that prioritizes high-priority task coverage while keeping energy low.",
        "feasibility_choice": "Strict mode ensures all constraints are satisfied from the start.",
        "objective_focus": "Same as global: missed priority then energy.",
        "target_policy": "Focus on assigning unassigned priority tasks first.",
        "resource_usage": "Use up to 10 solver actions, full iteration and time budget to construct a good initial solution.",
        "exit_strategy": "Succeed as soon as a feasible solution exists; fail if all allowed actions are used or iteration limit reached."
      }
    }
  }
}
```

</details>

{
  "supervisor_decision": {
